name: Chocolate & Orange Pistachio Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, eggs, orange juice, oil, and pistachio pudding; blend at low speed for 1 minute.
2. Beat at high speed for 3 minutes.
3. Pour two-thirds of the batter into a greased and floured 12-inch bundt pan.
4. Add chocolate syrup to the remaining one-third of the batter and mix at medium speed until well blended.
5. Pour over the top of the batter and marbleize by cutting through the batter with a knife.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan for 10-15 minutes, then turn onto a wire rack or serving plate to complete cooling.
8. Top with chocolate glaze by combining all ingredients until well blended and spooning over the top of the cake, allowing some to run down the sides.
